SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.smtp

Interface MessageSource

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
FileMessageSource, InMemoryMessageSource, RefCountedFileMessageSource
public interface MessageSource extends Serializable
Canonical message source abstraction for an envelope payload.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default MessageSource
    acquire()
    Acquires a reference to this message source.
    Optional<Path>
    getMaterializedPath()
    Gets the materialized path if one already exists.
    Path
    materialize(Path targetFile)
    Materializes the message into the provided target file path.
    InputStream
    openStream()
    Opens a new input stream for the message contents.
    byte[]
    readAllBytes()
    Reads the full message into memory.
    default void
    release()
    Releases a reference to this message source.
    long
    size()
    Gets the message size in bytes.

  • Method Details

    • acquire

      default MessageSource acquire()
      Acquires a reference to this message source.

      For reference-counted sources, this increments the reference count. Callers must ensure a matching release() call when done.

      Returns:
      This message source for chaining.

    • release

      default void release()
      Releases a reference to this message source.

      For reference-counted file sources, this decrements the reference count and deletes the backing file when the count reaches zero.

      For in-memory sources, this is a no-op.

    • openStream

      InputStream openStream() throws IOException
      Opens a new input stream for the message contents.
      Returns:
      InputStream instance.
      Throws:
      IOException - On I/O error.

    • readAllBytes

      byte[] readAllBytes() throws IOException
      Reads the full message into memory.
      Returns:
      Message bytes.
      Throws:
      IOException - On I/O error.

    • size

      long size() throws IOException
      Gets the message size in bytes.
      Returns:
      Message size.
      Throws:
      IOException - On I/O error.

    • getMaterializedPath

      Optional<Path> getMaterializedPath()
      Gets the materialized path if one already exists.
      Returns:
      Optional path.

    • materialize

      Path materialize(Path targetFile) throws IOException
      Materializes the message into the provided target file path.
      Parameters:
      targetFile - Target file path.
      Returns:
      Materialized file path.
      Throws:
      IOException - On I/O error.
